criteria.reason: Operator records ledger events for the attention brief, consent policy update, and paid action preflight API paths.
Events reuse agent_action_ledger through log_agent_action with capability localos.operator; no migration was added.
GET /api/operator/events is authenticated, business-scoped, and read-only.
The Operator dashboard renders a compact recent event journal.
Sprint 6 adds observability only; paid execution, Apify, charging, generation, parsequeue, and provider writes remain absent.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py
